title: DNSSEC
description: DNSSEC adds an extra layer of authentication layer to DNS, making sure that visitors go to your domain instead of a spoofed domain. Additionally, you have access to DNS Analytics.

title: WAF Protection Demo
description: Explore how Cloudflare WAF protects your applications from common vulnerabilities.

title: Zero Trust Access Demo
description: See Zero Trust access controls in action to protect internal applications.

title: DNS Security Demo
description: Learn how Cloudflare DNS services can protect your domain from threats.

title: Images Transformations Demo
description: There are two main methods to transform images: via URL - usually also used with srcset -, or via Workers. The Workers method allows for more programmatic customization, as well as more complex transformations. The URL method is simpler to implement, such as using width=auto to automatically resize the image based on the available browser and device information.

title: CAPTCHA Alternative Demo
description: Experience Cloudflare Turnstile, the privacy-friendly CAPTCHA alternative.

title: Data Localization Demo
description: See how Cloudflare helps maintain compliance with regional data regulations.

title: Waiting Room Demo
description: Waiting Room helps manage surges in website traffic, especially during high-demand events like Black Friday.

title: Gateway Demo
description: See how Cloudflare Gateway secures your organization's Internet traffic.

title: AI Platform Demo
description: Explore Cloudflare's AI platform capabilities to build and deploy AI-powered applications.
